title: Smoky Wholesome Australian Fermented Food Grill
description: A smoky, pillowy, and comforting Australian dish featuring fermented mustard, perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon on the raclette grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium heat.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, minced garlic, chopped kale, and caraway seeds.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fermented mustard, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, salt, black pepper, smoked paprika, and bush tomato.
Add the mustard mixture to the cabbage mixture and toss to coat.
Place a sheet of parchment paper on the preheated raclette grill and add the cabbage mixture.
Close the grill and smoke for 30 minutes, flipping the cabbage mixture halfway through.
While the cabbage is smoking, prepare the wood chips for smoking.
Add the wood chips to the grill and continue to smoke for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the cabbage mixture from the grill and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional bush tomato and smoked paprika if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over mashed potatoes for a filling meal.
